rationale: Keep as a descriptive result candidate because it is directly backed by the GBD 2023 default endpoint row, but rewrite during manuscript review to match journal style and final GBD citation wording.
citation_rule: Use the IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool citation draft from gbd_query_profile.json; final citation wording must be confirmed before submission.
ui_rule: Report lower and upper as UI values from the source row; do not describe them as p values or confidence intervals.
metric_rule: This is a Number metric claim; do not mix with rate or percent claims in the same sentence.
age_rule: All ages is a GBD age category and is not age-standardized or age-adjusted.
manuscript_action: Retain for manuscript review as a Results sentence candidate.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after final citation, reuse terms, and journal wording review are complete.

rationale: Keep as a descriptive result candidate because it is directly backed by the GBD 2023 default endpoint DALY number row; avoid interpreting DALYs mechanistically.
citation_rule: Use the IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool citation draft from gbd_query_profile.json; final citation wording must be confirmed before submission.
ui_rule: Report lower and upper as UI values from the source row; do not describe them as p values or confidence intervals.
metric_rule: This is a Number metric claim; DALY wording must stay descriptive unless a manuscript-specific analytic frame is added.
age_rule: All ages is a GBD age category and is not age-standardized or age-adjusted.
manuscript_action: Retain for manuscript review as a Results sentence candidate.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after final citation, reuse terms, and journal wording review are complete.

rationale: Use as a supporting trend descriptor only because the current calculation is a simple endpoint-scale relative change and does not propagate uncertainty for the change estimate.
citation_rule: Use the IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool citation draft from gbd_query_profile.json; final citation wording must be confirmed before submission.
ui_rule: Report source rate UI values for 1990 and 2023 if mentioned; do not imply an uncertainty interval for the derived percent change unless calculated separately.
metric_rule: This is a Rate metric comparison; keep separate from Number metric claims and label it as endpoint-scale relative change.
age_rule: All ages rate is not age-standardized; do not compare it with age-standardized rates.
manuscript_action: Downgrade to supporting Results sentence or supplement unless a formal trend method is added.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only if rate-scale wording, uncertainty handling for the derived change, citation, and reuse terms are finalized.

rationale: Keep as a mandatory manuscript boundary because it prevents overclaiming from the default global all-cause endpoint.
citation_rule: Use the IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool citation draft from gbd_query_profile.json; final citation wording must be confirmed before submission.
ui_rule: State that uncertainty interpretation is pending final manuscript review; do not convert UI to CI wording.
metric_rule: Boundary statement must mention measure/metric separation when claims combine deaths, DALYs, and rates.
age_rule: Boundary statement must explicitly say All ages is not age-standardized.
manuscript_action: Retain in Methods or Limitations as a data-use and interpretation boundary.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after final data-use, citation, and journal limitation wording are confirmed.
